scripts.android:build: npm run build && npx cap sync && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['android/app/capacitor.build.gradle','android/capacitor-cordova-android-plugins/build.gradle','node_modules/@capacitor/splash-screen/android/build.gradle','node_modules/@capacitor/camera/android/build.gradle','node_modules/@capacitor-community/privacy-screen/android/build.gradle'].forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)){let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(/VERSION_21/g,'VERSION_17').replace(/jvmToolchain\(21\)/g,'jvmToolchain(17)');fs.writeFileSync(f,c)}})" && cd android && ./gradlew clean assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run build && npx cap sync && node -e "const fs=require('fs');['android/app/capacitor.build.gradle','android/capacitor-cordova-android-plugins/build.gradle','node_modules/@capacitor/splash-screen/android/build.gradle','node_modules/@capacitor/camera/android/build.gradle','node_modules/@capacitor-community/privacy-screen/android/build.gradle'].forEach(f=>{if(fs.existsSync(f)){let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');c=c.replace(/VERSION_21/g,'VERSION_17').replace(/jvmToolchain\(21\)/g,'jvmToolchain(17)');fs.writeFileSync(f,c)}})" && cd android && ./gradlew clean bundleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
